title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 370.330 - Dividends, when declared — how paid
text:
370.330.  Dividends, when declared — how paid. — After allocations to required reserves, a credit union may declare dividends on general shares, membership shares, or both, at the discretion of its board of directors and as its bylaws provide.
(RSMo 1939 § 5538, A.L. 1965 p. 569, A.L. 1969 H.B. 117, A.L. 1984 H.B. 962) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 5096
